mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : MarkItemSettingDAO.mrkItmStngList 설 명 : 성적항목설정 목록 조회(공통코드 기준 + 과목별 설정값) */
SELECT CD.CD AS MRK_ITM_TYCD , CD.CDNM AS MRK_ITM_TYNM , STNG.MRK_RFLTRT , STNG.MRK_OYN , NVL(STNG.MRK_ITM_USEYN, 'N') AS MRK_ITM_USEYN FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CD LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MRK_ITM_STNG STNG ON STNG.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND STNG.MRK_ITM_TYCD = CD.CD WHERE CD.UP_CD = 'MRK_ITM_TYCD' AND CD.UP_CD != CD.CD AND CD.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND CD.LANG_CD = NVL(#{langCd}, 'ko') ORDER BY CD.CD_SEQNO
